education_records_high_school_research_e.name: education_records_high_school_research_empty
education_records_high_school_research_e.value: "education_records"."level" <> 'HIGH_SCHOOL' or ("education_records"."research_title" is null and "education_records"."research_description" is null)

work_experiences_end_date_consistent.name: work_experiences_end_date_consistent
work_experiences_end_date_consistent.value: ("work_experiences"."is_current" and "work_experiences"."end_month" is null and "work_experiences"."end_year" is null) or (not "work_experiences"."is_current" and "work_experiences"."end_month" is not null and "work_experiences"."end_year" is not null)
